formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}(\text{ETS}) \underset{\mathbf{x} , \mathbf{b}}{min} Z_{1} \left(\mathbf{x} , \mathbf{b}\right) = w_{T} \underset{i \in \mathcal{I}}{\sum} \underset{t \in \mathcal{T} \backslash \left\{t_{0}\right\}}{\sum} \delta \cdot \left(n_{t_{0}}^{i} + \underset{\bar{t} \in \left[t_{0} , t\right]}{\sum} \left(d_{\bar{t}}^{i} - b_{\bar{t}}^{i}\right)\right) + w_{E} \underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , j , t , t^{'}\right) \in \mathcal{A}}{\sum} E_{k} \left(i , j , t , t^{'}\right) x_{i j t t^{'}}^{k}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix} & \underset{i^{'} \in \left[1 , i\right]}{\sum} \underset{t \in \mathcal{T}}{\sum} \left[\sum_{j > i}^{2 I} \delta \cdot p_{i^{'} j} \left(t + \delta\right) \underset{\overset{\sim}{t} \in \left[t_{0} , t\right]}{\sum} \underset{t^{'} \in \mathcal{T}}{\sum} \left(x_{i^{'} \left(i^{'} + 1\right) \overset{\sim}{t} t^{'}}^{k - 1} - x_{i^{'} \left(i^{'} + 1\right) \overset{\sim}{t} t^{'}}^{k}\right)\right] \leq C_{k} , \\ & \forall i \in \mathcal{I} , k \in \mathcal{K} \backslash \left\{1\right\}\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0035
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\begin{cases} & \underset{\mathbf{x} , \mathbf{b} , \mathbf{r}}{min} Z \left(\mathbf{x} , \mathbf{b} , \mathbf{r}\right) = w_{E} \left[\underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , j , t , t^{'}\right) \in \mathcal{A}}{\sum} E_{k} \left(i , j , t , t^{'}\right) x_{i j t t^{'}}^{k} - \underset{t \in \mathcal{T}^{M}}{\sum} \underset{u \in \mathcal{U}}{\sum} r_{t}^{u}\right] \\ & + w_{T} \underset{i \in \mathcal{I}}{\sum} \underset{t \in \mathcal{T} \backslash \left\{t_{0}\right\}}{\sum} \delta \left(n_{t_{0}}^{i} + \underset{\bar{t} \in \left[t_{0} , t\right]}{\sum} \left(d_{\bar{t}}^{i} - b_{\bar{t}}^{i}\right)\right) \\ & s . t . \text{constraints} \left(19\right) - \left(32\right) \\ & r_{t}^{u} \leq F_{a} \left(u , t\right) , \forall u \in \mathcal{U} , t \in \mathcal{T}^{M} \\ & r_{t}^{u} \leq c_{a} R_{b} \left(u , t\right) , \forall u \in \mathcal{U} , t \in \mathcal{T}^{M} \\ & r_{t}^{u} \in \mathbb{R}^{+} , \forall u \in \mathcal{U} , t \in \mathcal{T}^{M} . \end{cases}\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0036
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}\Delta \left(\mathbf{\mathit{\rho}}\right) : = \underset{\mathbf{x} , \mathbf{b} , \mathbf{r}}{min} & \left\{\right. \left[w_{E} \underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , j , t , t^{'}\right) \in \mathcal{A}}{\sum} E_{k} \left(i , j , t , t^{'}\right) x_{i j t t^{'}}^{k} - w_{E} \underset{t \in \mathcal{T}^{M}}{\sum} \underset{u \in \mathcal{U}}{\sum} r_{t}^{u} - \underset{i \in \mathcal{I}}{\sum} \underset{t \in \mathcal{T} \backslash \left\{t_{0}\right\}}{\sum} \rho_{t}^{i} \underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} x_{i i t^{'} t}^{k} b_{m a x}^{i}\right] \\ & + \underset{i \in \mathcal{I}}{\sum} \underset{t \in \mathcal{T} \backslash \left\{t_{0}\right\}}{\sum} \left[w_{T} \delta n_{t_{0}}^{i} + w_{T} \underset{\bar{t} \in \left[t_{0} , t\right]}{\sum} \delta \left(d_{\bar{t}}^{i} - b_{\bar{t}}^{i}\right) + \rho_{t}^{i} b_{t}^{i}\right] \left.\right\}\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eq0037
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\Gamma \left(\mathbf{\mathit{\rho}}\right) : = \underset{\mathbf{x} , \mathbf{r}}{min} \left[\underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , j , t , t^{'}\right) \in \mathcal{A}}{\sum} w_{E} E_{k} \left(i , j , t , t^{'}\right) x_{i j t t^{'}}^{k} - \underset{t \in \mathcal{T}^{M}}{\sum} \underset{u \in \mathcal{U}}{\sum} w_{E} r_{t}^{u} - \underset{i \in \mathcal{I}}{\sum} \underset{t \in \mathcal{T} \backslash \left\{t_{0}\right\}}{\sum} \rho_{t}^{i} \underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} x_{i i t^{'} t}^{k} b_{m a x}^{i}\right]\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0039
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\begin{matrix}\Phi \left(\mathbf{\mathit{\rho}}\right) : = & \underset{\mathbf{b}}{min} \underset{i \in \mathcal{I}}{\sum} \underset{t \in \mathcal{T} \backslash \left\{t_{0}\right\}}{\sum} w_{T} \delta \left(n_{t_{0}}^{i} + \underset{\bar{t} \in \left[t_{0} , t\right]}{\sum} \left(d_{\bar{t}}^{i} - b_{\bar{t}}^{i}\right)\right) + \underset{i \in \mathcal{I}}{\sum} \underset{t \in \mathcal{T} \backslash \left\{t_{0}\right\}}{\sum} \rho_{t}^{i} b_{t}^{i} \\ & \text{s}.\text{t}. \underset{\bar{t} \in \left[t_{0} , t\right]}{\sum} b_{\bar{t}}^{i} \leq n_{t_{0}}^{i} + \underset{\bar{t} \in \left[t_{0} , t\right]}{\sum} d_{\bar{t}}^{i} , \forall i \in \mathcal{I} , t \in \mathcal{T} \\ & b_{t}^{i} \in \mathbb{N}^{+} , \forall i \in \mathcal{I} , t \in \mathcal{T} .\end{matrix}\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0040
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\begin{matrix}\Phi_{i} \left(\mathbf{\mathit{\rho}}\right) : = & \underset{\mathbf{b}}{min} \underset{t \in \mathcal{T} \backslash \left\{t_{0}\right\}}{\sum} w_{T} \delta \left(n_{t_{0}}^{i} + \underset{\bar{t} \in \left[t_{0} , t\right]}{\sum} \left(d_{\bar{t}}^{i} - b_{\bar{t}}^{i}\right)\right) + \underset{t \in \mathcal{T} \backslash \left\{t_{0}\right\}}{\sum} \rho_{t}^{i} b_{t}^{i} \\ & \text{s}.\text{t}. \underset{\bar{t} \in \left[t_{0} , t\right]}{\sum} b_{\bar{t}}^{i} \leq n_{t_{0}}^{i} + \underset{\bar{t} \in \left[t_{0} , t\right]}{\sum} d_{\bar{t}}^{i} , \forall t \in \mathcal{T} \\ & b_{t}^{i} \leq b_{m a x}^{i} , \forall t \in \mathcal{T} \\ & b_{t}^{i} \in \mathbb{N}^{+} , \forall t \in \mathcal{T} ,\end{matrix}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: b_{t}^{i} \leq \underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} x_{i i t^{'} t}^{k} b_{m a x}^{i}

formulas.label: eq0042
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\left(\rho_{t}^{i}\right)^{w + 1} = max \left\{\left(\rho_{t}^{i}\right)^{w} + \lambda^{w} \left(\left(\left(\bar{b}\right)_{t}^{i}\right)^{w} - \underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} \left(\left(\bar{x}\right)_{i i t^{'} t}^{k}\right)^{w} b_{m a x}^{i}\right) , 0\right\} , \forall i \in \mathcal{I} , t \in \mathcal{T} \backslash \left\{t_{0}\right\} ,\end{matrix}
